# Intermiles Platinum Credit Card
Elevate Your Travel Experience
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?utm_content=MKTG&Lgcode=MKTG "Apply Now")
![Intermiles Platinum Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/intermiles-platinum-credit-card-desktop-banner?fmt=webp)

More benefits than ever before
  * Earn 4 InterMiles for every ₹150 spent on retail purchases.
  * Earn 8 InterMiles for every ₹150 spent on flight tickets booked [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.intermiles.com/flights)
  * Earn 8 InterMiles on every Rs. 150 spent on every Hotel <https://interbook.intermiles.com/>[(opens in a new tab)](https://interbook.intermiles.com/)


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
### Banking Benefits
  * Up to 3,000 bonus InterMiles.
  * 1,500 InterMiles upon spending ₹3,000 within the first 30 days.
  * 1,500 InterMiles on total retail spends of ₹50,000 and above, within the first 90 days.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-platinum-credit-card "View More")
![Intermiles Platinum Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
Travel Benefits
  * ₹500 flight discount vouchers* for the first year.
  * ₹1,000 hotel discount vouchers* for the first year.
  * *Renewal benefits are applicable only on realisation of the membership fee. [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-platinum-credit-card/intermiles-hdfc-bank-diners-club-credit-card.pdf) for terms and conditions.
  * InterMiles once credited to the customer’s InterMiles account cannot be converted to Reward Points.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-platinum-credit-card "View More")
![Intermiles Platinum Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Dining Benefits
  * Up to 20% discount on dining bills paid via Dineout Pay via InterMiles.
  * Maximum discount per transaction, per customer per month capped at ₹1,000.
  * [Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/v1/foryou) for more details.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-platinum-credit-card "View More")
![Intermiles Platinum Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible?
For Salaried
  * **Nationality:** Indian 
  * **Age:** Minimum: 21 years, Maximum: 60 years
  * **Income:** Net Monthly Income > ₹35,000


For Self Employed
  * **Nationality:** Indian 
  * **Age** : Minimum: 21 years, Maximum: 65 years
  * **Annual Income** : ITR > ₹6 lakh (as per ITR)


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Save up to ₹10,000* annually
Just like 24 lakh+ HDFC Bank cardholders
[Calculate now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?utm_content=MKTG&Lgcode=MKTG&icid=website_organic_herobanner_intermileshdfcbankplatinumcreditcard:banner:applynow#nbb "Calculate now")
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs


Address Proof
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


Income Proof
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  * Form 16
  * Bank statements


## Application Process
**Online application process:**
  * Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN
  * Step 2- Confirm your details
  * Step 3- Select your Card
  * Step 4- Submit & Receive your Card*


*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.
![no data](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### InterMiles Accrual Programme
  3. ### Lounge Access
  4. ### Added Delights
  5. ### Privileges on Etihad Airways
  6. ### Most Important Terms & Conditions


###  Card Control via MyCards 
**Single Interface**
  * One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 


**Spends tracking**
  * Simple interface to track all your spends


**Reward Points**
  * View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  InterMiles Accrual Programme 
  * 4 InterMiles on every ₹150 spent on retail spends.
  * 8 InterMiles on every ₹150 spent on every flight ticket booked [here(opens in a new tab)](https://flights.intermiles.com).
  * 8 InterMiles on every ₹150 spent on every Hotel [here(opens in a new tab)](https://interbook.intermiles.com/).


Note:
  * Only retail purchases above ₹150 qualify for InterMiles. 
  * Cash advances, fuel transactions, fees, easy EMI, e-wallet loading and other charges do not accrue any InterMiles. 
  * InterMiles accrued will be reversed if a retail transaction is converted into SmartEMI.
  * InterMiles for insurance transactions capped at 2,000 per day.


![Make Payments More Rewarding with PayZapp](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Lounge Access 
  * Domestic Lounge access using your boarding pass to select lounges at airports in India.
  * 8 complimentary visits per year, 2 per quarter through the VISA Lounge Program, [Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-platinum-credit-card/pdfs/lounge-access-intermiles-platinum-credit-card.pdf).
  * Nominal fee charges for card validation.
  * 8 complimentary visits per year, 2 per quarter through the MasterCard Lounge Program.


![Card Reward and Redemption Program](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Added Delights 
**Renewal Membership Fee Waiver**
  * Renewal fee waiver on spending ₹2.5lakh within 12 months from card setup/ renewal date.
  * *In case of a fee waiver, the member will not receive flight/hotel discount vouchers.


**Fuel Surcharge Waiver**
  * 1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations across India on minimum transactions of ₹400, capped at ₹250 every billing cycle.
  * Effective April 15, 2016, InterMiles will not be accrued on fuel transactions. GST charges on fuel surcharge are non-refundable.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-platinum-credit-card/pdfs/classification-public-intermiles-platinum-credit-card.pdf) for details.


**Safe & Secure Transactions**
  * Safe transactions at any chip-enabled POS or swipe your card at any non-chip POS. 


**Zero liability**
  * Zero cost liability on fraudulent transactions upon reporting it immediately to our 24-hour call centre. 


**Lowest Revolving Credit**
  * Revolving credit at a nominal interest rate of 3.6% per month, effective September 01, 2020. 


**Interest-free Credit**
  * Up to 50 days of free credit period from the date of purchase. 


**Cards for your Entire Family**
  * Up to 3 add-on cards* for your immediate family members (over 18 years). 
  * * All card features on InterMiles HDFC Bank Credit Card are only applicable for the primary cardholder and not for add-on card holders.


![Fees and Renewal](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Privileges on Etihad Airways 
  * 5% discount* on Etihad Airways economy class tickets booked at <http://flights.intermiles.com>[(opens in a new tab)](http://flights.intermiles.com)
  * 2.5X InterMiles for Etihad Airways tickets booked on <https://flights.intermiles.com>[(opens in a new tab)](https://flights.intermiles.com).


*Terms and Conditions apply, kindly [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://cards.intermiles.com/card-details/InterMiles-HDFC-Bank-Platinum-Credit-Card) to read through the terms and conditions
![Fees and Renewal](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms & Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-platinum-credit-card/intermiles-hdfc-bank-diners-club-credit-card.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Most Important Terms & Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  Does InterMiles Platinum Card have lounge access?
Yes, the **_InterMiles Platinum Card_** enables you to access select domestic airport lounges in India up to 8 times a year, or twice per quarter. Enjoy a luxurious airport experience with complimentary lounge access.
###  What is the InterMiles Credit Card?
The InterMiles Credit Card is a co-branded **[Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards)** program by HDFC Bank that offers exciting features, rewards, and privileges. It allows you to earn InterMiles on your everyday spends and provides various travel and lifestyle benefits.
###  How can I use the InterMiles Credit Card? 
  * Use your card for everyday purchases to earn InterMiles
  * Redeem InterMiles online at [www.Intermiles.com(opens in a new tab)](http://www.intermiles.com/) for a wide range of rewards
  * Book flight tickets and hotel accommodation using your InterMiles
  * Enjoy the convenience and flexibility of contactless payments


###  How does InterMiles Credit Card work?
With the **InterMiles Card** , you can earn InterMiles on every retail purchase you make. These InterMiles can be redeemed for **flight tickets** , hotel bookings, dining vouchers, merchandise, and more. The more you use your card, the more rewards you can earn.
###  What are the benefits of InterMiles Credit Card?
The _Intermiles Credit Card_ offer a wide range of benefits to enjoy. You can:
  * Earn InterMiles on every retail purchase
  * Redeem InterMiles for special gift vouchers of flight tickets, hotel bookings, dining vouchers, merchandise, and more
  * Enjoy exclusive privileges and discounts with partner brands
  * Avail comprehensive insurance coverage for travel and emergencies*


###  What is the use of an InterMiles Credit Card?
The _**InterMiles Credit Card**_ allows you to earn rewards on your everyday spends and provides exclusive benefits such as welcome bonuses, complimentary lounge access, travel insurance, dining offers, and more. It enhances your travel and lifestyle experiences while offering financial convenience.
